This weekly roundup collects all of the coolest new gadgets, the most interesting updates in the world of tech, and today we have the early Amazon Big Spring Sale deals and a giant collection of spring Apple deals joined by teasers for the new LEGO Jurassic World sets, the new Retro wireless Receiver for N64, the latest Switch 2 GameCube release, and much more waiting below.

We have already featured many of these deals as they started to land in the early Big Spring Sale at Amazon, but stock is clearly starting to dwindle on various configs and colors here and we wanted to make sure they were front and center for folks while the up to $300 in savings was still available. items.summary:
Welcome to 9to5Toys Battlestation Weekly – your go-to spot for the notable deals and latest releases in PC gaming at a glance every Saturday morning. Best Buy’s Tech Fest kicked off earlier in the week, bringing notable deals across everything from Copilot+ PCs and gaming laptops to a wide range of peripherals. We also tracked a bunch of solid deals on Samsung’s Odyssey gaming monitors, with several models dropping to fresh lows. All of that and more is waiting for you below in this week’s Battlestation Weekly.
